title: AKARI Compatibility Manifest
description:
Compatibility manifest for AKARI OS components. Declares a component's version and its dependency version ranges.

Used to validate and resolve dependencies across AKARI OS components (Shell, Agents, Pool, SDK, and protocols).

Ref: spec-os-update-and-compatibility.md §6.4

name.description: Component identifier (e.g., 'shell', 'agents', 'pool_impl', 'sdk'). Should match directory/repo name in kebab-case or snake_case.

version.description: Semantic version of the component (e.g., '0.4.2'). Must follow SemVer 2.0.0.

requires.description:
Required versions of upstream dependencies. Maps component name to version range constraint.

Example: requires = { agents = ">=0.3.0, <0.5.0", pool_impl = ">=0.5.0, <0.7.0" }

provides.description:
API surface provided by this component and their versions. Maps API name to version number.

Example: provides = { shell_api = "0.4", window_manager_api = "0.2" }
